title: December 9th, 2020 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
        - epic personal events of the last decade
            - lived at chevy chase
            - st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ed and left wotc, moved to seattle and back
            - unemployed for a year after wotc
            - lived with jade and wyatt
            - lived with micah and bianca
            - cutting dad off after months of being bullied by him over moving back to austin and leaving wotc
            - ferguson
            - marcus making threats for weeks + after i ran out of extra money to send him and had to tell him no
            - st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ed and let go from activision after finishing battle cast, lived in austin and la for almost two years
            - kerrie relationship disintegration and revelation leading to us opening up our relationship
            - moved into 6410 auburn dr
            - held up at gunpoint while walking from my house to friends house at night. still live in the same neighborhood. lived in the house for 4 more years
            - noble aquemini moreno was born
            - trump elected
            - unemployed for a year after battle cast
            - st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ed seismic, shipped spellslingers, acquired by niantic, took extended leave from niantic
            - kate
            - coming out to bob and jade about open relationship and kate
            - brandi and kyle and felix
            - telling mom and bob about brandi kyle and felix
            - major ankle and toe injury playing bnasketball in fall of 2019
            - covid
            - george floyd shot, widespread protests and resistance crescendo
            - mom, hershel, and arleen
            - moved into 1607 wheless ln
            - diagnosed with adhd and bipolar2h
    - professional
        - maybe your god is like that
            - lyrics
                - i untie nots and decompose cants
                - i cosine thoughts and solo chants
                - i untry hard and wonder why god
                - gave me these hands
                - maybe these plans of mine are divine
                - please excuse if i don't find the time to seek excuses
                - to need another man to tell me i'm fine
                - to cordon the according to keep me in line
                - to keep me on hold like they hold the line and this one won't work it isn't worth tryin
                - maybe you got it like that, maybe your god is like that
                - mine moves everything and won't stop for anything
                - who am i to fight that
                - so i lie back and contemplate
                - i fly pastiche cloud to open space
                - where i can bend and stretch when i wanna break
                - and when i let go i don't know if i'm a drop or levitate
                - no matter though, not even a ghost of a chance to stop or hesitate
                - never straight lines from b to get to a
                - things take time at the same time they're never late
                - it just seems that way when we get stuck yesterday
            - https://www.reddit.com/r/thisisourmusic/comments/k4g6e2/experimental_hiphop_maybe_your_god_is_like_that/
            - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gk8ua4otxdo
    - professional
